## Contributor checklist

- [ ] Branch is named `kasa-<N>/<short-description>` (lowercase issue prefix).
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `perf:`).
- [ ] Every commit carries a `Signed-off-by` trailer (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] Tests and linters pass locally.
- [ ] Docs and/or `README.md` updated when behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] **CLA:** I have read and signed the applicable Contributor License Agreement — the [Individual CLA (ICLA)](../legal/ICLA.md) or the [Corporate CLA (CCLA)](../legal/CCLA.md) — **OR** I have previously signed it and my contribution is covered.
- [ ] I agree to follow the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
